daily_summary.headline: SpaceX CRS-34 and Aurora Opportunities Highlight the Day

top_events.title: SpaceX Falcon 9 Block 5 | Dragon CRS-2 SpX-34
top_events.description: SpaceX launches its 34th commercial resupply mission to the ISS, carrying essential supplies and scientific payloads.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for real-time updates.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A G2 geomagnetic storm is predicted, offering a good chance to view auroras at latitudes down to 60°.
top_events.action: Check skies and head to a dark location for best viewing.

top_events.title: Zhuque-2E Launch
top_events.description: LandSpace's Zhuque-2E rocket is set to launch with an unknown payload, showcasing China's growing commercial space capabilities.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
